issues.description: The orchestrator encountered an error collecting tests: 'ERROR collecting tests/unit/fixture/test_manifest'. No test results are available.
issues.suggestion: Ensure that the test suite is runnable and that the test-orchestrator can successfully collect and report results for the fixture package.
Resolve the test collection error to allow the orchestrator to complete the gathering phase and provide a full evidence bundle.

rationale: The implementation cannot be approved because the evidence collection process was aborted (partial_gate_abort). Specifically, the test-orchestrator failed to collect tests, resulting in an absent test signal. Per the Absence-of-Failure guards, an absent signal is not a pass.
